name: sillytavern-ai-gm-extension
description: AI-GM Extension for SillyTavern — Cthulhu-style solo TRPG experience with LLM-driven storytelling, state panel, NPC decision, scene rendering, and dice resolution system.

scripts.test: node test/index.js && node test/extension-mount.js && node test/ui-integration.js
scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check server.js && node --check engine/*.js && node --check utils/*.js && node --check storage/*.js && node --check ui/*.js
